evals.prompt: Our SAM deploy rolled back and the stack is stuck in UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED after bad resource wiring. Recover safely.
evals.expected_behavior: Inspects CloudFormation events and drift, avoids blind redeploy loops, and considers continue-update-rollback or template fixes only after understanding the first broken resource.
assertions: Treats UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED as more than a simple retry
Uses stack events or drift evidence before recovery actions
Keeps focus on SAM/CloudFormation rather than Go binary packaging

evals.prompt: Fix this SAM template validation error; resources need portable ARNs without hardcoding account/region.
evals.expected_behavior: Runs or recommends sam validate --lint first, fixes schema/property/wiring issues, and prefers !Sub with AWS::AccountId/AWS::Region over hardcoded ARNs.
assertions: Prioritizes sam validate --lint before repeated deploys
Mentions dynamic ARNs or avoiding hardcoded account/region
Confirms SAM transform headers when relevant

evals.prompt: The Go Lambda zip is missing the bootstrap binary and fails before the template is the problem.
evals.expected_behavior: Routes to aws-lambda-go-deployment because packaging/runtime is the primary blocker, not SAM template wiring.
assertions: Does not keep iterating on SAM template schema as the main fix
Routes toward aws-lambda-go-deployment or Lambda packaging guidance
